info.title: Cardcore API
info.description: OpenAPI reference generated from the Cardcore Postman collection in this repository.

get.description: List OAuth applications for the authenticated institution.

delete.description: Delete an OAuth authorization/application by id.

post.description: Register an OAuth application for an institution.

example.name: My Banking App
example.description: Banking application for managing customer accounts and transactions

post.description: Exchange client assertion for access token. Also captures `{{oauthToken}}` and `{{oauthRefreshToken}}`.
Create an OAuth authorization code grant authorization.

put.description: Change card PIN using encrypted pin blocks.

post.description: Enroll one or more cards into 2FA.

get.description: Fetch the card default PIN payload.

200.description: Resend Institution User Invitation completed successfully.

get.description: Public endpoint returning available institution permissions.

post.description: Import an existing card into the system. Requires `x-api-key`.
